# Zhong et al. 2025 — canonical map (auto-generated, do not hand-edit)

_Generated by `scripts/build_canonical_map.py` from the release inventory + reproduction code._

**89 recordings · 19 mice.** Cohorts overlap — see the ‘also’ column.


## Cohorts

- **sup** — Supervised / task: water-deprived, licking in the leaf corridor delivers water (reward-driven).
- **unsup** — Unsupervised: same stimuli, NOT water-deprived, no reward (exposure only).
- **naive** — Naive baseline: imaged before/without the training protocol (OVERLAPS other cohorts — a naive recording reuses a sup/unsup/grating mouse).
- **grating** — Grating control: a separate control group shown grating stimuli.

## Brain-area codes (`iarea` → region)  ⚠️ authoritative

| group | iarea codes | region | role |
|---|---|---|---|
| `V1` | [8] | V1 (primary visual cortex) | detects visual input & novelty; prespecified primary area |
| `mHV` | [0, 1, 2, 9] | medial higher visual areas (PM / AM / MMA, + lateral RSC collectively) | greatest learning-related plasticity / discrimination (the effect localizes here) |
| `lHV` | [5, 6] | lateral higher visual areas | strong novelty response |
| `aHV` | [3, 4] | anterior higher visual areas | reward-prediction / task signals (supervised mice only) |
| `unassigned` | [-1, 7] | outside any retinotopically mapped area | excluded from area analyses (-1 = no area) |

> ⚠️ The early team map `{1:'V1',2:'mHV',3:'aHV'}` is **wrong** — V1 is code **8**, not 1. Use the table above.


## Stimulus roles (`stim_id` → meaning)  — functional, assigned per session

| stim_id | role | meaning | rewarded |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | `circle1` | unrewarded reference texture | — |
| 1 | `circle2` | circle-family test texture (generalization) — unrewarded | — |
| 2 | `leaf1` | the REWARDED reference texture (licking here delivers water) | ✅ |
| 3 | `leaf2` | leaf-family test texture — INTRODUCED WITHOUT reward (Test 1 generalization) | — |
| 4 | `leaf3` | further leaf-family test texture (Test 2) — introduced without reward | — |
| 5 | `leaf1_swap1` | swapped/modified leaf1 control texture | — |
| 6 | `leaf1_swap2` | swapped/modified leaf1 control texture | — |

> Selectivity **d′ compares `leaf1` (2) vs `circle1` (0)**. Roles come from which wall is rewarded (`get_cat_id`), not the physical texture.
